reviews.comment:
Como todo A.C.A, cargas con seguridad de lo que te ponen en el tanque. Buena atencion. Y algo que ya no se consigue en casi ninguna estacion de servicio. Aire Gratis!!!

(Translated by Google)
Like all A.C.A. stations, you can fill up with the exact amount of fuel they put in your tank. Good service. And something you can hardly find at any other gas station these days: Free air!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3398041021459195715/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnMWNHWDdRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Lamentablemente nos atendió un empleado q no debería pertenecer al club! El sr SERGIO ALEJANDRO OLIVERA del centro integral de seguros del ACA de Olivos, ha sido irrespetuoso, airado e incompetente!

Cabe agregar q caso contrario, su compañera del box contiguo intervino xa ayudarle, además de pedirnos disculpas x la actitud de su desubicado compañero!

(Translated by Google)
Unfortunately, we were served by an employee who shouldn't be working at the club! Mr. Sergio Alejandro Olivera from the ACA Olivos insurance center was disrespectful, angry, and incompetent!

It's worth adding that, unlike his colleague in the next booth, he intervened to help her and apologized to us for her inappropriate colleague's behavior!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3398041021459195715/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURndUllcWtRRRAB
